Potion.description: A small vial of restorative liquid that heals a significant amount of HP when consumed.

Ether.description: A shimmering fluid that restores a portion of the user's MP when drunk.

Medicine.description: A bitter remedy that clears all status ailments from the user when taken in battle.

Stimulant.description: A powerful combat drug that resets skill cooldowns, letting the user act again sooner.

Bomb.description: A throwable explosive that detonates in a burst of fire, hitting all enemies with a chance to burn.

Lifespark Crystal.description: A crystallized ember of life force. Shatters automatically when the bearer falls, reviving them in the heat of battle.
